## Review Trigger
Scheduled cadence, event trigger, or manual trigger.

## Scope Window
What feature window or subsystem set is in scope?

## Objectives
What should this review verify or improve?

## Known Signals
Existing debt, hotspots, incidents, or delivery friction.

## Expected Output
No action, refactor plan, or escalation.
